scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project planningsaman-3cf7e --only firestore,storage 'npx vitest run lib/__tests__/firestore-rules-documentos.test.ts lib/__tests__/storage-rules-documentos.test.ts'
scripts.test:e2e: npm run emulators & sleep 5 && npm run seed && NEXT_PUBLIC_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost NEXT_PUBLIC_EMULATOR_PORTS=8081,9099 next dev & sleep 8 && npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts; kill $(lsof -ti:3000 -ti:8081 -ti:9099 -ti:4000) 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:prepare && npm run deploy:functions && npm run deploy:hosting
scripts.deploy:prepare: rm -rf functions/standalone && cp -r .next/standalone functions/standalone && cp -r .next/static functions/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public functions/standalone/ 2>/dev/null; true
